sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26820" key="dii/ambos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δι-ίαμβος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n26820.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">syzygy of two iambic feet,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope></bibl>, D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:p.120" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.120</biblScope> </bibl> U., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
